verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The judge did not initiate any discussion rounds. While the initial assessments were unanimous and correct, the strategy of not asking follow-up questions to verify specific details (like the exact street name text) represents a missed opportunity for higher quality verification, though it was not a failure given the clarity of the evidence.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous evidence from all agents to identify Italy. The reasoning accurately cited the specific linguistic and regulatory evidence found in the image.
